description_long: This is a New Balance athletic shoe featuring a predominantly navy blue upper with a large, cream-colored 'N' logo on the side. The shoe has a low-top silhouette with a rounded toe, lace-up closure, and a padded collar for comfort. The heel area is accented with a greenish-gray panel and the 'new balance' branding in white. The midsole is white with a maroon accent running along the side, and the outsole appears to be made of durable rubber. The interior lining is red, and the tongue displays the New Balance logo in white on a red background. The overall design is sporty and casual, suitable for urban environments.
description: A navy blue New Balance athletic shoe with a cream 'N' logo, greenish-gray heel accent, and white midsole, designed for comfort and urban use.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the greenish-gray heel panel and 'new balance' branding in white.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large cream 'N' logo and the shoe's low-top profile.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the rounded toe, navy blue laces, and red tongue with the New Balance logo.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with the 'N' logo and visible maroon midsole accent.
attribute_logo: White 'new balance' text on the heel, large cream 'N' on the side, and white New Balance logo on the red tongue.
